name: galaxy-graph-workspace

scripts.build: npm -w @galaxy-graph/core run build && npm -w @galaxy-graph/adapters run build && npm -w @galaxy-graph/cli run build && npm -w @galaxy-graph/example-basic run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @galaxy-graph/core run typecheck && npm -w @galaxy-graph/adapters run typecheck && npm -w @galaxy-graph/cli run typecheck && npm -w @galaxy-graph/example-basic run typecheck
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm -w @galaxy-graph/core pack --dry-run && npm -w @galaxy-graph/adapters pack --dry-run && npm -w @galaxy-graph/cli pack --dry-run

description: Interactive backend architecture, confidence, and service-intent maps for TypeScript systems.
author: Ben Sheridan Edwards
